description: Style Note The comfort of these boxers will be addictive and the fun prints simply add on to the attraction of they hold. myntra boxers are simply must have for men who like breathable and airy boxers.Product Details Blue, white and red printed boxers, has a soft elasticated waistband and a key hole flyMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
